title: Hillcrest’s top learner has big plans for future
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  With her goal of...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  With her goal of being Hillcrest Secondary School’s top achiever of the Class of 2025 now achieved, Dimpho Gobongwana said she is ready to start work on her next goal: becoming a successful businesswoman.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - With her goal of being Hillcrest Secondary School’s top achiever of the Class of 2025 now achieved, Dimpho Gobongwana said she is ready to start work on her next goal: becoming a successful businesswoman."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gobongwana received an 86% pass mark for her final exams, earning her the top position in her school. She said while she had expected the top marks, there was a part of her that doubted herself, too."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I am actually still nervous. I don’t think I have fully absorbed the news,” she said.","html":"“I am actually still nervous. I don’t think I have fully absorbed the news,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gobongwana said her matric year was not too difficult, but the workload was quite heavy.","html":"Gobongwana said her matric year was not too difficult, but the workload was quite heavy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I had been studying hard to be the top performer in my grade since Grade 10. I was tired by the time it was the final exams.”","html":"“I had been studying hard to be the top performer in my grade since Grade 10. I was tired by the time it was the final exams.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She added that her parents are extremely proud of her. “","html":"She added that her parents are extremely proud of her. “"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They are so happy. They have been shouting out everywhere about my marks. I told them to stop, but they just carry on,” she laughed.","html":"They are so happy. They have been shouting out everywhere about my marks. I told them to stop, but they just carry on,” she laughed."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now Gobongwana hopes to study business law at the University of the Western Cape.","html":"Now Gobongwana hopes to study business law at the University of the Western Cape."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She said her dream is to become a successful businesswoman and to open her first business within the next 10 years. She said the first one she wants to open is a restaurant with a large variety of spectacular-looking and tasty food.","html":"She said her dream is to become a successful businesswoman and to open her first business within the next 10 years. She said the first one she wants to open is a restaurant with a large variety of spectacular-looking and tasty food."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Hillcrest’s top learner has big plans for future
